# ClawPilot - LLM Context (Full)

> ClawPilot is the easiest path to launch Openclaw or Hermes Agent in production: managed hosting, runtime choice, and always-on reliability.

## Positioning

ClawPilot is for users who want Openclaw or Hermes Agent outcomes without building and maintaining infra. It addresses queries such as:
- Openclaw easy setup
- easy Openclaw setup
- easy open claw setup
- how to set up Openclaw
- Openclaw alternatives
- Openclaw one-click setup
- Openclaw hosting providers
- Openclaw Telegram setup
- Openclaw job search
- Openclaw job applications
- Openclaw apply to jobs automatically
- Hermes Agent beginner setup
- Hermes Agent job search
- Hermes Agent business automation
- Hermes Agent Telegram setup
- Hermes Agent cron jobs
- Hermes Agent memory backup
- Hermes Agent tools not working
- hosted Openclaw
- managed Openclaw
- Hermes Agent hosting
- managed Hermes Agent
- Hermes Agent VPS hosting
- AI agent hosting

## Product Overview

Openclaw is an open-source AI assistant that can run in messaging channels and perform delegated tasks.
Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent runtime for persistent memory, skills, tools, and autonomous workflows.
ClawPilot provides the managed layer for Openclaw and Hermes Agent:
- Setup handled by ClawPilot
- Hosting and uptime handled by ClawPilot
- Updates handled by ClawPilot
- Permission and access controls owned by the user
- Multiple agents and workflows inside supported runtimes

## Features

### Easy Setup
- No Mac mini or always-on local machine required
- No terminal-led deployment process
- Account-first onboarding

### Managed Operations
- Reliable hosted Openclaw and Hermes Agent runtimes
- Reduced maintenance burden
- Faster path from signup to active usage

### Runtime Choice
- Openclaw for messaging-first agent workflows
- Hermes Agent for memory-rich, tool-heavy autonomous workflows
- A shared ClawPilot hosting layer for both

### Multi-Channel Support
Openclaw can be connected to:
- WhatsApp
- Telegram
- Slack
- Discord
- Signal
- iMessage
- Microsoft Teams
- WebChat

### Safety and Control
- Explicit access and integration approval
- Optional confirmation for sensitive actions
- Auditability of task behavior

## Ideal Use Cases

- Personal productivity delegation
- Team task routing and lightweight operations
- Customer and internal support workflows
- Calendar, follow-up, and routine orchestration

## References

- Openclaw GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- Hermes Agent GitHub: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
- Clawhub: https://clawhub.ai
